title: MDP Annual Business Plan and Corporate Plan 2025 to 2029
body: "The Ministry of Defence Police (MDP) Corporate Plan sets out the operational and organisational strategic objectives and priorities for the MDP from 2025 to 2029.  The MDP Annual Business Plan sets out the objectives for the Force, aligning with each of the strategic priorities from the Corporate Plan. The MDP Annual Business Plan 2022/23 remains extant.  "
